news.title:
Analysts recommend Adani Power, Titan, Cummins India, Mankind Pharma, and Arvind Ltd. based on technical patterns and sectoral momentum.
Targets include Adani Power at Rs 170, Titan at Rs 4,180, Cummins India at Rs 4,820, Mankind Pharma at Rs 2,250, and Arvind Ltd. at Rs 430.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Adani Power, Titan, Cummins India, Mankind Pharma, and Arvind Ltd. based on technical patterns and sectoral momentum.
Targets include Adani Power at Rs 170, Titan at Rs 4,180, Cummins India at Rs 4,820, Mankind Pharma at Rs 2,250, and Arvind Ltd. at Rs 430.

news.title:
Titan, Adani Power, and GPIL are bullish picks; Titan targets Rs. 4,500, Adani Power Rs. 180, GPIL Rs. 298.
Titan shows a breakout; Adani Power confirms uptrend; GPIL breaks triangle, RSI above 60 for all stocks.
news.summary:
Titan, Adani Power, and GPIL are bullish picks; Titan targets Rs. 4,500, Adani Power Rs. 180, GPIL Rs. 298.
Titan shows a breakout; Adani Power confirms uptrend; GPIL breaks triangle, RSI above 60 for all stocks.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed Titan's ratings, assigning AAA (Stable) for Rs. 6,200 crore and Rs. 1,000 crore instruments.
Enhanced fund-based/non-fund-based working capital facilities rated AAA (Stable) for Rs. 14,750 crore, up from Rs. 7,305 crore.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed Titan's ratings, assigning AAA (Stable) for Rs. 6,200 crore and Rs. 1,000 crore instruments.
Enhanced fund-based/non-fund-based working capital facilities rated AAA (Stable) for Rs. 14,750 crore, up from Rs. 7,305 crore.

news.title: Titan Company gets ICRA AAA Stable, ICRA A1 ratings for Rs 21,950 crore debt.
news.summary: Titan Company gets ICRA AAA Stable, ICRA A1 ratings for Rs 21,950 crore debt.

news.title:
Titan appoints Ms. Ruma Kishore as new CDIO effective July 1, 2026.
Ms. Kishore, an IIM Mumbai alumna, has 28 years of digital leadership experience.
news.summary:
Titan appoints Ms. Ruma Kishore as new CDIO effective July 1, 2026.

news.title:
Titan's $4B Gulf market expansion stalled due to West Asia war.
Damas expansion plans delayed amidst ongoing regional conflict.
news.summary:
Titan's $4B Gulf market expansion stalled due to West Asia war.
Damas expansion plans delayed amidst ongoing regional conflict.

news.title:
West Asia tensions delay Titan's Damas Jewellery expansion, stalling its $4B Gulf market push and exports amid volatile demand.
Titan's rivals like Kalyan Jewellers, Joyalukkas face similar inventory challenges, with Gulf business disruptions hitting the jewellery sector.
news.summary:
West Asia tensions delay Titan's Damas Jewellery expansion, stalling its $4B Gulf market push and exports amid volatile demand.
Titan's rivals like Kalyan Jewellers, Joyalukkas face similar inventory challenges, with Gulf business disruptions hitting the jewellery sector.

news.title: Titan shares surge in Nifty50, driven by CLSA's target of ₹5,000.
news.summary: Titan shares surge in Nifty50, driven by CLSA's target of ₹5,000.

news.title:
CLSA upgrades Titan to 'Outperform', raises target price to Rs 4996.
Q4 FY26 sales grew 43% YoY, jewellery up 57.6%, margins dipped to 10.4%.
news.summary:
CLSA upgrades Titan to 'Outperform', raises target price to Rs 4996.
Q4 FY26 sales grew 43% YoY, jewellery up 57.6%, margins dipped to 10.4%.

news.title:
Gold and silver prices fell 22% and 45% from peaks, impacting stocks like PC Jeweller, Kalyan Jewellers, Muthoot Finance, and Manappuram Finance.
Jewellery retailers like Titan may benefit from higher demand, while gold financiers and silver-linked firms like Vedanta face short-term challenges.
news.summary:
Gold and silver prices fell 22% and 45% from peaks, impacting stocks like PC Jeweller, Kalyan Jewellers, Muthoot Finance, and Manappuram Finance.
Jewellery retailers like Titan may benefit from higher demand, while gold financiers and silver-linked firms like Vedanta face short-term challenges.

news.title: Titan relies on silver amid rising gold prices deterring entry-level buyers.
news.summary: Titan relies on silver amid rising gold prices deterring entry-level buyers.

news.title:
Titan shifts focus to studded silver jewellery to counter high gold prices, targeting entry-level buyers under ₹1 lakh.
CaratLane's Shaya brand sees 30% growth in affordable silver, while Mia by Tanishq reports 30-50% silver segment expansion.
news.summary:
Titan shifts focus to studded silver jewellery to counter high gold prices, targeting entry-level buyers under ₹1 lakh.
CaratLane's Shaya brand sees 30% growth in affordable silver, while Mia by Tanishq reports 30-50% silver segment expansion.

news.title:
Titan Company Ltd redeemed ₹1000 crore Commercial Papers issued on 16 Feb 2026.
Maturity proceeds have been paid, and details are available on Titan's website.

Titan's initiatives like studded jewellery, celebrity promotions, and network expansion support growth momentum.

news.title:
Tata Group Q3 FY26 results show diverse performance; Titan saw 36% QoQ revenue growth, TCS revenue rose 2%, but profit declined 12%.
Tata Steel revenue fell 3% QoQ but surged 6% YoY; Trent and Oriental Hotels showed strong profitability, while Tata Investment profits dropped QoQ.
news.summary:
Tata Group Q3 FY26 results show diverse performance; Titan saw 36% QoQ revenue growth, TCS revenue rose 2%, but profit declined 12%.
Tata Steel revenue fell 3% QoQ but surged 6% YoY; Trent and Oriental Hotels showed strong profitability, while Tata Investment profits dropped QoQ.
